_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: jeromead
data.message:
Fix EsfStatus serialization

Reads the 7 bytes of field reserved1 as described in the UBX-ESF-STATUS msg.
The field reserved1 was missing and led to incorrect values for EsfStatus.
